title: Open work permits for family members of foreign workers: When to apply - Canada.ca
content:
Depending on your situation, your eligible family members may
- be able to apply for their work permit at the same time as you, either online or at the port of entry
- need to apply separately, or after their arrival in Canada
Answer a few questions to find out when your eligible family members should apply.

## Your family member must apply for their work permit after you enter Canada
Your family member can’t apply at the same time as you. They must apply separately, after you’ve applied.
Find out how family members of foreign workers can get an open work permit .

### Your family member needs to wait for your application to be approved
Your family member can only apply for an open work permit after you’re approved as an International Experience Canada participant.
Find out how family members of foreign workers can get an open work permit .

### Your family member can apply online with you from outside Canada
You and your family members can submit your applications as a group.
Find out how family members of foreign workers can get an open work permit .

### You may be able to apply as a family group at the port of entry
If you and your family members arrive at the port of entry together, you must all be eligible to apply for a work permit upon entry .

### Your family members can apply after you apply
Your family members can apply for a work permit after you (the principal applicant) have applied for your work permit, even if they’re eligible to apply with you.
Find out what your family member needs to do to apply for an open work permit separately from you .

### Your family member can apply online with you from within Canada
You and your family members can submit your applications as a group. Find out how family members of foreign workers can get an open work permit .

### Your family member must apply for their work permit separately from you
Your family member can’t apply at the same time as you. They must apply separately, after you’ve applied.
Find out how family members of foreign workers can get an open work permit .

### Your family member is applying for their work permit separately from you from within Canada
Your family members can apply for a work permit after you (the principal applicant) extended your authorization to work without a work permit, even if they’re eligible to apply with you.
Find out how family members of foreign workers can get an open work permit .

### Your family member is applying online with you when you apply for your post-graduation work permit
When you apply for your post-graduation work permit, your family member can apply online with you, if
- they’ve arrived in Canada
- they meet the requirements to apply for a work permit after they enter Canada

### Your family member is applying separately after you apply for your post-graduation work permit
Your family member can apply for an open work permit after you’ve submitted your post-graduation work permit (PGWP) application, even if
- you’re waiting on a decision on your PGWP application
- you’re currently working without a work permit while transitioning from full-time student to PGWP holder

#### Applying before a decision is made
If your family member applies for an open work permit after you apply for yours, but you’re waiting for a decision on your PGWP application, your family member needs to keep the following in mind:
- Your PGWP must be approved before your family member’s application can be processed.
- Your family member’s open work permit may be refused if a decision hasn’t been made on your PGWP application by the time their application is processed.
Find out how family members of foreign workers can get an open work permit .
